code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut last = ""
mut found = false
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_end = true
      end
    when None
      is_end = true
    end
  end
  if is_end
    let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
    let llen = string.len(line)
    mut j = llen - 1
    mut nonempty = false
    mut keep_going = true
    while keep_going
      if j < 0
        keep_going = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, j)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
            j = j - 1
          else
            nonempty = true
            keep_going = false
          end
        when None
          keep_going = false
        end
      end
    end
    if nonempty
      last = line
      found = true
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(last)
else
  println("(none)")
end
